posts.title: CS:GO Update Replaces Dust 2 with Anubis
posts.excerpt: Anubis is a community-made map created by the winners of the Mapcore Mapping Contest 2019: Roald, jakuza, and jd40. Valve first added Anubis to CS:GO’s Scrimmage map pool in May, 2019, and a week later, players got to play it in the Competitive mode.
